description_long: This is a modern baseball cap featuring a structured, rounded crown made from white fabric and a contrasting black, curved brim. The front panel displays a prominent red circular logo with a stylized white symbol inside, adding a bold visual accent. The back of the cap includes an open arch, typical of adjustable snapback or strapback designs, allowing for size customization. The stitching is visible along the seams, reinforcing the panels and providing durability. The cap's materials appear to be a blend of cotton or polyester for the crown and brim, with a likely plastic or metal adjustment mechanism at the rear. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear in city environments.
description: A white baseball cap with a black curved brim and a red circular logo on the front, featuring a structured crown and an adjustable open back. The design is sporty and urban, with visible stitching and a bold accent logo.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open arch for adjustment and the red circular logo on the lower back panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the smooth, rounded white crown and the extended black curved brim.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the open arch for size adjustment and the seamless white crown panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black brim and the clean, uninterrupted white crown.
attribute_brand_or_logo: red circular logo with stylized white symbol
